label: Login Page
desc: Entry login page for the Enterprise webapp.

label: Auth (Email + OTP)
desc: Authentication between the Login page and the Landing search page: enter work email, receive a one-time code, verify it.

label: Landing Search Page
desc: The page we land on after submitting a correct OTP.

label: Landing Repo Page
desc: Sub-org workspace home.
via: Type jeet-test-org in the search bar → click jeet-test-org

label: New session (Composer)
desc: Prompt box, Agent/Ask mode, repo and context selectors, and session tools.
via: Use the composer on the home page

label: Automations
desc: Automations list; create at /automations/create. Includes legacy Schedules.

label: Security (Code scan)
desc: Code scans, profiles, and secure mode coverage.

label: Wiki
desc: Repo wiki at /wiki/<owner>/<repo>?branch=<b>.

label: Review
desc: Devin Review landing and pull-request review UI.

label: Top Left Menu
desc: Top-left corner dropdown: Enterprise settings, Invite members, org switcher, switch account, log out.

label: Preferences
desc: Profile, display, notifications, git identity, pull-request, and Review preferences.

label: Personal Connections
desc: Personal integration and MCP account connections.

label: My Analytics
desc: Personal usage and consumption analytics.

label: Settings
desc: Enterprise settings root; left-nav with all enterprise tabs below.

label: General
desc: Enterprise authentication and SSO requirements.

label: Connections
desc: GitHub/GitLab configure, repos, disconnect, register app; MCPs tab.

label: Sessions
desc: Enterprise session discovery, search, filters, and navigation.

label: Devin
desc: Devin model, tool, git identity, and pull-request configuration.

label: Review
desc: Devin Review enterprise configuration.

label: Knowledge
desc: Org knowledge notes.

label: Environment
desc: Environment configuration, blueprints, outposts, snapshots, and steering knowledge.

label: Playbooks
desc: Org playbooks.

label: Skills & Rules
desc: Enterprise skill usage, sources, task types, and session drill-downs.

label: Repositories
desc: Organization-scoped repository access and permissions.

label: Membership
desc: Enterprise members and invitations.

label: Organizations
desc: Sub-org list: create, search, drill into per-org settings.

label: Sub-orgs and Settings
desc: Per-sub-org settings: General, Connections, Products, Resources, and Administration.

label: Devin API
desc: Service users, scoped credentials, and Legacy API access.

label: Guardrails
desc: Enterprise guardrail policies, actions, and violation records.

label: Infra
desc: Hypervisor, VPC, tenant health, and capacity monitoring.

label: Analytics
desc: Enterprise usage, consumption, category, organization, user, and repository analytics.

label: Secrets
desc: Organization and personal credentials for future Devin sessions.

label: Support Page
desc: In-app support and help resources.

label: Create Organisation
desc: Create a sub-organization with an ACU limit and initial members.

label: Roles
desc: Enterprise and organization role management.

label: Groups (IdP)
desc: Identity-provider groups and mappings.
